risk_title: ARTF Cancellation Due to Extraordinary Political Situation
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) component of the project was canceled because the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan, indicating severe political instability or conflict preventing normal project operations.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan.

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating
risk_summary: Political and Governance risk category is rated as High, indicating significant fragility in the political environment and governance structures affecting project implementation sustainability.
